FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: We have answers
FAQ.description: Responses to the most common questions about PsicoAIssist.

security.question: Is PsicoAIssist safe for confidential patient data?
security.answer: Absolutely. PsicoAIssist complies with GDPR, LOPD-GDD, and international security standards. We use AES-256 encryption, servers in Europe, and never store unencrypted data. Each session is processed in an isolated and secure manner.

transcription.question: How does automatic transcription work?
transcription.answer: Our AI system listens to the session in real-time and transcribes automatically. It recognizes speech in Spanish (including regional accents), Catalan, and English, identifies speakers (therapist/patient), and formats text professionally. Accuracy is 95%+. Audio is processed in real-time and is NEVER recorded or stored on our servers.

customization.question: Can I customize the generated reports?
customization.answer: Yes. With the Premium plan, you can configure your "Personal Brand" settings. This allows you to add your logo, clinic name, and corporate colors, which will be automatically applied to all PDF and Word reports generated to maintain your professional image.

cancellation.question: What happens if I cancel my subscription?
cancellation.answer: You retain access to all your data for 90 days. You can export all sessions, reports, and notes at any time. If you decide to return during this period, simply log in with your old credentials to reactivate your account automatically.

limits.question: Is there a limit on the number of patients?
limits.answer: It depends on the plan. The Basic plan includes up to 25 patients. Pro and Premium plans allow unlimited patients. Premium adds advanced features like personal branding and higher AI capacity. For clinics and hospitals, we have tailored corporate plans.

support.question: Do you offer technical support?
support.answer: Yes, our support team speaks Spanish, Catalan, and English and will assist you via email. Video calls are available for onboarding, higher plans, or if the technical team deems it necessary. We also offer full documentation in these languages.

integration.question: Can I integrate PsicoAIssist with my current system?
integration.answer: We offer APIs and integrations with major clinic management systems. You can also export data to import into your existing system. Our technical team can help you with the integration.

languages.question: What languages does the system support?
languages.answer: Mainly Catalan, Spanish, and English with high accuracy. We also support French, Portuguese, and Italian. We are adding more languages based on user demand.

trial.question: Is there a free trial period?
trial.answer: We have a 14-day Demo Plan to try. You can test key functionalities at no cost before choosing your professional plan.

Terms.title: Terms and Conditions of Use
Terms.subtitle: Service agreement for mental health professionals

nature.title: 1. Nature of Service
nature.text: This application is an Artificial Intelligence-based clinical decision support tool. Its goal is to assist the professional in session management and document draft generation.
nature.warning: The tool DOES NOT replace professional judgment, nor does it perform automated diagnoses, nor dictate medical or pharmacological treatments.

responsibility.title: 2. Professional Responsibility
responsibility.text: The user (accredited mental health professional) acknowledges and accepts that:

list.1: They are solely responsible for verifying AI-generated information before using it or including it in clinical records.
list.2: They are responsible for obtaining informed consent from patients for the use of session support tools.
list.3: They maintain final responsibility for any clinical decision made regarding their patients.

ownership.title: 3. Data Ownership
ownership.text: All clinical data, session notes, and patient information entered into the platform are the exclusive property of the professional and/or the patient, as applicable. The platform acts as a data processor, limited to safeguarding and processing information according to user instructions.

usage.title: 4. Acceptable Use
usage.text: The user commits to ethical use of the platform, respecting the profession's Code of Ethics and current regulations. Using the system for illicit, discriminatory purposes or those that violate human dignity is prohibited.

ethics.title: 5. Ethical and Professional Limits
ethics.intro: Platform use is subject to the following unbreakable ethical limits, aligned with current deontological regulations:

diagnosis.title: AUTOMATED DIAGNOSIS PROHIBITION
diagnosis.text: Using AI outputs as definitive clinical diagnoses is strictly prohibited. AI is a guidance support tool; diagnosis is an act exclusive to the human professional.

emergency.title: DUTY OF EMERGENCY
emergency.text: The application IS NOT an emergency or crisis intervention device. In situations of imminent risk of suicide or harm to others, the professional must act according to conventional emergency protocols, without relying on tool processing.

transparency.title: TRANSPARENCY WITH THE PATIENT
transparency.text: It is the professional's ethical obligation to inform the patient about the use of technological support tools during the session and guarantee that this use does not interfere with the quality of the therapeutic alliance.

fairUse.title: 6. Fair Use Policy
fairUse.text: To ensure system stability and service quality for all users, plans with 'Unlimited' features are subject to the following monthly security caps:
fairUse.warning: * Use exceeding these limits is considered abusive and may result in temporary account suspension or support contact.

plans.title: 7. Subscription Plans and Features
plans.intro: Below are the available plans and their contractual features. Prices may be subject to applicable taxes.
plans.policy: Monthly Reset Policy: All quotas included in plans (transcription minutes, simulator cases, etc.) reset automatically at the start of each billing cycle. Unused resources during the current month do not roll over to the next month.

clinics.title: For Health Centers, Universities and Hospitals

agenda.desc: Additional administrative user for appointment management. No access to clinical records.

aiPack.title: AI Minutes Pack
aiPack.desc: 500 additional AI processing minutes. One-time payment, do not expire while subscription is active.

onboarding.title: Assisted Onboarding
onboarding.desc: 45 min session with a specialist for initial setup and data import.

simPack.title: Simulator Pack
simPack.desc: Pack of 10 additional interactive clinical cases for practice. Includes detailed AI feedback.

liability.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
liability.text: The platform is not responsible for possible errors in transcription or AI suggestions, as it is a probabilistic technology. Human verification is indispensable in all cases.

AIJustification.title: Legal and Regulatory Documentation
AIJustification.subtitle: AI Act Ready • GDPR Compliant • Professional Ethics

General.title: AI Support System for Mental Health Guidance

nature.title: Nature of the System
nature.text: The artificial intelligence system acts exclusively as a support tool for professionals, without the capacity for diagnosis, prescription, or automated clinical decision-making.

classification.title: Classification under the AI Act
classification.text: The system falls within high-risk AI systems as support for decision-making, but does not make automated decisions, in accordance with Articles 14 and 22 of the GDPR and the European AI Act framework.

limitations.title: Functional Limitation
list: Does not suggest instruments in real-time.
Only shows options at the end of the session.
Explicitly limits the number of themes and instruments.

traceability.title: Traceability and Auditability
traceability.text: Each instrument suggestion includes a descriptive justification (why_this_test_was_suggested) based on:
traceability.footer: There is no opaque decision or non-explainable model.

minors.title: Protection of Minors
minors.intro: When the system is used with minors:
list: Developmental and non-diagnostic language is used.
The final decision always rests with the responsible adult and the professional.

compliance.title: Regulatory Compliance
items: Ethical principles of psychological testing usage

Compliance.title: Regulatory Compliance Document
Compliance.subtitle: Artificial intelligence system for professional report generation

object.title: Purpose of the Document
object.text1: This document aims to describe and accredit the regulatory, technical, and ethical compliance of the artificial intelligence system (hereinafter, the system) used exclusively as a tool to support the drafting of professional reports in the field of mental health.
object.text2: The types of reports covered by the system are:
object.alert: The system does not adopt automated decisions, does not issue clinical diagnoses, does not establish causalities nor substitute professional judgment, and operates under mandatory human supervision in all phases.

framework.title: Applicable Regulatory Framework
framework.intro: The design, development, and use of the system comply with the following regulatory framework:
list: Regulation (EU) 2016/679, of April 27, 2016 (General Data Protection Regulation – GDPR).
Professional and deontological regulations applicable to professional practice.
Ethical principles regarding the use of technological tools in the preparation of professional reports.

description.title: General System Description
description.text: The system is an AI-based drafting assistance tool that generates structured report drafts from:
list1: Clinical notes written by the professional.
Explicit parameters defined by the professional (report type, structure, linguistic profile).
featuresList: Total absence of autonomous decision-making capacity.
Explicit prohibition of generating unfounded content.

risk.title: Risk Classification under the AI Act
risk.text: Given the nature of the generated reports and their possible impact on the rights and interests of natural persons, the system is classified as a high-risk AI system under the European Artificial Intelligence Act.
risk.intro: Consequently, the system incorporates the guarantees required for this category, including:
list: Transparency in the use of AI.
Complete traceability of the generation process.
Technical measures to prevent errors, biases, and misuse.
Reinforced controls for especially sensitive uses (legal-forensic reports).

sub1.title: 5.1. Mandatory Supervision
sub1.text: All reports generated with system support mandatorily require:
list: Full review of content by a qualified professional.
Express validation before any external use or communication to third parties.
Explicit confirmation of human review before marking a report as finalized.
sub1.note: In the case of legal-forensic reports, a reinforced supervision mode applies, preventing report finalization without specific human validation.

sub2.title: 5.2. Responsibility
sub2.text1: Responsibility for the final content of the report lies exclusively with the professional who reviews, validates, and signs it.
sub2.text2: The system cannot be considered author, co-author, or responsible for the content of any report.

sub1.title: 6.1. Legal Basis
list: Informed, explicit, and verifiable consent of the data subject.
Compliance with professional and legal obligations.

sub2.title: 6.2. Minimization
list: The system does not infer additional data.

sub3.title: 6.3. Treatment of Special Data
list: Reinforced technical security measures (encryption, access control).
Data not used to train AI models.

sub4.title: 6.4. Exercise of Rights
sub4.text: The exercise of rights of access, rectification, erasure, limitation of processing, and information on the use of AI is guaranteed.

transparency.title: Transparency and Information to Data Subjects
transparency.text: All generated reports incorporate an explicit statement indicating:
list: That they have been drafted with the support of an AI tool.
That the content is not the result of an automated decision.
That the report has been reviewed and validated by a responsible professional.

ethics.title: Applied Ethical Principles
ethics.text: The design and use of the system respects the following principles:
avoidList: Predictions of future conduct or evolution.

forensic.title: Specific Controls for Legal-Forensic Reports
forensic.text: Legal-forensic reports are subject to a reinforced security mode (Safe Forensic Mode) which includes:
list: Technical prohibition of categorical or causal affirmations.
Obligation to explicitly differentiate between observed facts and patient statements.
Automated content validations before allowing finalization.
Express confirmation of reinforced human review.

traceability_control.title: Traceability and Control
traceability_control.text: The system maintains auditable internal records regarding:
list: Date and time of generation of each draft.
System version and AI model utilized.

limitations.title: System Limitations
list: The system does not substitute professional evaluation or judgment.
Generated reports have guidance character until validated.
Use outside professional context or without human supervision constitutes misuse.

declaration.title: Final Declaration of Compliance
declaration.text: The artificial intelligence system described in this document has been designed and implemented in accordance with applicable legal, technical, and ethical requirements under current European regulations, and incorporates specific guarantees for responsible, transparent, traceable use under effective human control.

sections.footer: *Document prepared for purposes of justifying regulatory compliance before competent authorities, internal or external audits, and inspection processes.*

Cookies.title: Cookie Policy
Cookies.subtitle: Information about the use of cookies and similar technologies

what.title: 1. What are cookies?
what.text: A cookie is a small text file that is stored in your browser when you visit almost any webpage. Its utility is for the web to be able to remember your visit when you browse that page again.

used.title: 2. Cookies used by this website
used.text: This application exclusively uses technical and session cookies necessary for the operation of the service.

auth.title: Authentication Cookies
auth.text: Used to identify the user once logged in, allowing access to private areas and ensuring the session remains active securely.

pref.title: Preference Cookies
pref.text: Store user interface preferences (such as language or font size) to personalize your experience.

sec.title: Security Cookies
sec.text: Help prevent security attacks and protect user data against unauthorized access.

third.title: 3. Third-party Cookies
third.text: Currently, we do not use advertising or tracking cookies from third parties (such as Google Analytics or Facebook Pixel) within the private area of the application. The privacy of the professional and patient is a priority.

deactivate.title: 4. How to deactivate cookies?
deactivate.text: You can restrict, block, or delete browser cookies at any time. Consult your browser's help to know how to do it. Please note that deactivating technical cookies could prevent the correct functioning of the application.

GDPR.title: Privacy Policy and GDPR
GDPR.subtitle: Commitment to the protection of personal and sensitive data

controller.title: 1. Data Controller
controller.text: The data controller is PsicoAIssist. We are committed to treating patient and professional data with maximum confidentiality, in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (GDPR).

sub1.title: 2.1 Personal Data
sub1.text: We collect information that you provide directly to us, including:

sub2.title: 2.2 Clinical Data
sub2.text: Patient clinical data is processed under strict security measures:

purpose.title: 3. Purpose of Processing
purpose.text: We use the collected information to:
list: Provide transcription and AI services (generate reports, analysis).
Manage clinical history and professional agenda.
Provide technical support and improve our algorithms (with anonymized data).
purpose.note: We do not use data for advertising purposes nor do we cede it to third parties without explicit consent, except for legal obligation or service providers under confidentiality agreement.

legal.title: 4. Legal Basis of Processing
legal.text: We process data under the following GDPR legal bases:
list: Legal compliance: For regulatory and fiscal obligations.

security.title: 5. Minimization and Security (Data Protection)
list: Minimization: Audio transcripts are processed ephemerally whenever possible.
Encryption: AES-256 for data at rest and TLS 1.3 for data in transit. Keys rotated periodically.
Access Control: Two-factor authentication, role-based access, and complete audit logs.
security.alertText: Despite security measures, we remind you that no system is invulnerable. The use of artificial intelligence implies data processing on secure servers. We guarantee that patient data is not used for training public models.

sharing.title: 6. Sharing Information
sharing.text: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal data with third parties, except:
list: Necessary service providers (under strict confidentiality agreements).

rights.title: 7. Rights of Data Subjects
rights.text: Both professionals and patients have the right to:
list: Erasure: Request deletion of their data (Right to be forgotten).
Portability: Receive their data in structured format.

retention.title: 8. Data Retention
list: Account data: As long as the account remains active. In case of cancellation request, data will be kept blocked for 30 days (grace period) before being permanently anonymized.
Clinical data: According to applicable medical regulations.

transfers.title: 9. International Transfers
transfers.text: All data is processed and stored on servers located within the European Union. We do not perform international data transfers outside the European Economic Area (EEA) without adequate GDPR guarantees.

contact.title: 10. Contact
contact.text: To exercise your rights or make privacy inquiries:

authority.title: 11. Control Authority
authority.text: You have the right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority if you consider that the processing of your personal data does not comply with current regulations.

Hero.badge: For Health Centers, Universities, and Hospitals
Hero.title:
Standardize Clinical Excellence
in your Organization
Hero.description: The comprehensive platform to manage teams, audit care quality, and train your new professionals with AI.

Features.mainDescription: Stop managing your clinic with spreadsheets and disconnected tools. Centralize operations, training, and quality control.
Features.trainingDesc: New hires? Have them practice with our Unlimited Clinical Simulator before seeing real patients. Expose them to complex cases (suicide, grief, BPD) in a safe environment.
Features.complianceDesc: Detailed log of access to medical records. Granular roles (Administrator, Supervisor, Professional, Agenda Manager) to comply with the strictest GDPR regulations.
Features.apiDesc: Connect PsicoAIssist with your hospital management software (SAP, Salesforce Health, etc.). Synchronize patients and schedules automatically.

Agenda.title: The "Agenda Manager" Role:
Agenda.subtitle: Organization without compromising privacy
Agenda.description: We know that coordination is key in a clinic, but confidentiality is sacred. That's why we created a unique role for your administrative staff.
Agenda.accessDesc: Your managers can handle appointments, payments, and schedules for the entire team without accessing the content of clinical notes or confidential reports.
Agenda.groupsDesc: Multiple locations? Child and Adult teams? Create "Groups" so each manager can filter and view only relevant schedules with a single click.

Simulator.title: The "Flight Simulator" for Psychologists
Simulator.description: The only platform that includes a 24/7 active AI trainer. Your professionals can practice difficult interventions and receive immediate feedback on empathy, treatment adherence, and CBT techniques.
Simulator.feature1: Create custom scenarios (e.g., Resistance to change)
Simulator.feature2: Automatic feedback based on clinical guidelines
Simulator.feature3: No cost per minute (Flat Training Rate)

CTA.title: Ready to scale your clinic?
CTA.description: Let's talk about your specific needs. We offer custom plans, assisted data migration, and on-site training.

validation.firstNameMin: First name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.lastNameMin: Last name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.consentDataRequired: You must obtain consent for data processing.
validation.consentAIRequired: You must inform about the use of AI systems.

personal.title: Personal Information
personal.description: Confidential patient data. This information will be encrypted.

communication.title: Communication Preferences
communication.description: Configure how appointment reminders will be sent.

consent.title: Informed Consent (GDPR)
consent.description: It is mandatory to register the patient's explicit consent before processing their data.

fields.emailRemindersDesc: Send automatic reminders to the registered email address.
fields.consentDataDesc: The patient authorizes the storage and processing of their personal and health data on the platform.
fields.consentAIDesc: The patient has been informed that Artificial Intelligence systems will be used to support the session.

privateNotes.empty: No notes registered for this patient.

Blog.subtitle: Practical tips on digitalization, AI ethics, and efficient clinic management.

Docs.title: Documentation Center
Docs.description: Everything you need to know to get the most out of PsicoAIssist. Detailed guides, quick tutorials, and complete references.

manual.title: User Manual
manual.description: Complete documentation on all platform functionalities. Learn about roles, patient management, billing, and AI analysis.

quickGuide.title: Quick Guide
quickGuide.description: In a hurry? Find out how to perform common tasks in less than a minute. Create appointments, add patients, and synchronize calendars.

tutorials.title: Video Tutorials
tutorials.description: Step-by-step visual guides. From initial setup to advanced use of AI statistics.

reference.title: Reference and Glossary
reference.description: Definitions of AI metrics, user roles, and technical documentation for integrations (API).

contact.text: Can't find what you're looking for?

Metadata.description: Empower your psychological practice with responsible AI. Automated transcription, professional reports, and intelligent analysis. GDPR compliant.
Metadata.keywords: psychologist, AI, transcription, sessions, GDPR, artificial intelligence, clinical reports, psychological practice, virtual assistant, automated transcription, session analysis, psychology software
